implementation_summary.summary: CP00-727 extends the RP24 Korean Legal Depth korean-legal descriptor from RP24.P02.M04.S19 through RP24.P02.M06.S14 across 40 planned P02 Secondary Workflow Slice tail, Permission And Audit Binding, and Synthetic Fixture Set units while preserving CP00-722 through CP00-726 as historical evidence and keeping HWPX, Korean clause, litigation, court filing, corporate document, permission, audit, Hermes runtime, and product-state surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-727 Korean Legal Depth P02 permission fixture bridge pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-727 RP24.P02.M04.S19-RP24.P02.M06.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
